description: A quiet side discovery near Aster Local 10. A faint distress beacon resolves into an unidentifiable wreckage. The player can inspect it and recover a small combat blueprint.

unidentified_wreckage_001.title: Unidentified Wreckage
unidentified_wreckage_001.scan_description: A broken hull fragment drifting near Aster Local 10. No registry returns, and the distress carrier is too degraded to identify.
unidentified_wreckage_001.contact_text: A faint distress beacon is bleeding through the wreckage.

reward_packet.message: Faint distress wreckage logged. Pulse Laser Mk1 Blueprint recovered.

travel_to_faint_distress_wreckage.objective_text: A faint distress beacon has been detected near Aster Local 10. Use Auto Pilot to investigate the signal source.

on_arrival.title: FAINT DISTRESS BEACON
on_arrival.text:
[b]SIGNAL SOURCE FOUND[/b]

The faint beacon resolves into a broken section of hull drifting cold near Aster Local 10.

No registry returns.
No clean transponder.
No visible life signs.

The wreckage is unidentifiable, but something inside it is still answering your scan.

inspect_unidentified_wreckage.success_text: Pulse Laser Mk1 Blueprint recovered from the wreckage.

faint_distress_wreckage_complete.objective_text: Faint distress wreckage investigated. Pulse Laser Mk1 Blueprint recovered.

handoff_notes: Immersive pass: converted the working wreckage side event into a faint distress beacon discovery.
Blueprint reward uses the proven gives_item path on the inspect step: pulse_laser_mk1_blueprint. reward_packet.blueprints is left empty because the current handler grants reward_packet.items only.
